name: restaurant owners processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For restaurant owners processing 10-20 invoices/month, inaccurate inventory tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
problem_solved: Inaccurate inventory tracking leads to cash flow gaps.
